 // ── Postgres adapter ─────────────────────────────────────────
 
-function makePgAdapter(url: string, ssl: boolean): Interface {

+function makePgAdapter(opts: {
+  connectionString: string
+  ssl?: boolean
+  poolSize?: number
+  poolMin?: number
+  connectionTimeoutMs?: number
+  idleTimeoutMs?: number
+}): Interface {
+  const client = initPg(opts.connectionString, opts.ssl ?? true)
